title: VendorX External Credential Compromise
description: VendorX service account credentials exfiltrated via phishing. Evidence of credential stuffing against 4 geographically dispersed IP blocks.

title: API Gateway Session Token Reuse — Lateral Movement Init
description: Session token issued to VendorX API gateway reused across 4 IP addresses. Token scope violation detected authenticating against internal database clusters.

title: Host Lateral Movement — web-prod-01 SSH Anomalies
description: 21 suspicious SSH authentication events originating from VendorX API gateway IP block against web-prod-01. Credential relay pattern confirmed.

title: Container Privilege Escalation — svc-cluster-7
description: Unauthorized EXEC executed inside svc-cluster-7. Host path mount attempted — container escape confirmed. IAM boundary violation by svc_account_7.

title: Unauthorized PII Database Access — Mass Exfiltration
description: 47,000 SELECT queries against customer_pii.users table in 3-hour window. 280x above baseline. 1GB data volume staged for egress. Potential GDPR breach requiring regulatory notification.

title: CARAG Active Discovery Hunt — Database Auth Schema
description: CARAG pipeline iteration 3 — SPL query reformulated to target session-token lateral movement on database authentication schemas. Confidence score: 0.87. Blast radius locked to 4 nodes.

title: VendorX API Key Revoked — Blast Radius Contained
description: IAM role svc_account_7 suspended. VendorX API key revoked. customer_pii and prod-db-01 placed under network isolation policy. Egress blocked from 4 compromised nodes. CARAG investigation complete — final confidence: 0.91.
